candidates.why: Direct top-line revenue label; preferred over duplicate total row.
Duplicate total revenue row with identical values; useful as fallback across years.
Not revenue; this is cost of revenue.

variables.notes: Used the more specific non-total revenue label first, with the duplicate total row as fallback.

candidates.row_label: Cost of goods and services sold
candidates.why: Direct COGS/cost of sales line.
Duplicate total cost-of-revenue row; less preferred than the direct line.

final_choice.row_label: Cost of goods and services sold

variables.notes: Selected the direct cost line rather than the duplicate total row.

candidates.why: Clear SG&A component.
Clear SG&A component.

variables.notes: No explicit combined SG&A row is present; selected the overhead component rows and excluded R&D, depreciation/amortization, and totals.

candidates.why: Direct reported R&D expense line.
Capitalized R&D is not the standard period expense line for XRD.

candidates.row_label: Amortization excluding Goodwill in Research & Development Expenses
candidates.why: Amortization should be excluded from XRD.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Capitalized Research & Development Expenses - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental amortization, not the core XRD expense line.

candidates.row_label: Research & Development Expense - Expensed & Capitalized - Total
candidates.why: Mixed expensed and capitalized total; less clean than direct expense line.

candidates.row_label: Research & Development Costs - Net - Balancing value
candidates.why: Balance sheet balancing value, not income statement R&D expense.

variables.notes: Used the direct income-statement R&D expense row only.

candidates.why: Broader finance-cost line that can serve as fallback when interest-expense detail is unavailable.
Best match for interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Only a component of total interest expense, so not preferred as primary mapping.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental component only.
Balancing row, should not be used.

variables.notes: Priority list: preferred direct interest-expense line first; broader financial expenses as fallback for years where detail is not separately reported.

candidates.why: Best available equity line on the balance sheet.
Not equity; full balance sheet total.

variables.notes: No separate parent/owners equity line or non-controlling interest line is shown, so Total Equity is used for BE and MIB is left empty to avoid double counting.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income before Minority Interest - Total
candidates.why: Income statement comprehensive-income line, not balance-sheet minority interest.

variables.notes: No balance-sheet minority interest/non-controlling interests row is present. Left empty per missing data rule.
